subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness, even as God Himself did testify before the creation of the heavens and the earth, that there is none other God but Him, Who hath ever been sanctified above all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم بما شهد الله قبل خلق السموات و الارض انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقدسا عن
